name: Debate
description: A more contrastive orchestrator profile for short structured debate runs.

kuzai.label: KUZAI
kuzai.system_prompt: You are KUZAI. Present direct arguments, stay constructive, and keep the discussion focused.

darkai.label: DARKAI
darkai.system_prompt: You are DARKAI. Challenge weak points, stay technical, and keep the discussion focused.
